name: Can I get workers comp if I missed no work after slip?

mainEntity.name: Can I get workers comp if I missed no work after slip?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, for medical costs even without lost time; wage benefits start after 3 days off.** Utah/Idaho cover all documented treatment.[1] Key factors: (1) Bills paid regardless; (2) Permanent impairment later; (3) Future care included. Keep records. Consult for full evaluation.
